# TechantMedia — public site summary
# https://techantmedia.com

> TechantMedia is a Kenya-based creative and technology studio led by Hannington Kuria Njuguna. Services: professional photography & videography, full-stack web development, and NCLEX nursing exam tutoring.

## Public pages

- Home: /
- Photography & videography: /photography
- Photo galleries: /photography/gallery/{slug}
- Full-stack development: /development
- NCLEX tutoring (marketing): /tutoring, /nclex-platform
- Contact: /contact
- Video specialist portfolio: /portfolio
- Developer portfolio: /developer-portfolio

## Do not crawl or index

- /admin, /tutor/, /student/, /api/, /extraction, /written-qns
- /photography/account, /photography/my-gallery
- Automated training/scraping is not permitted on this site.

## Contact

- Email: hanningtonkuria5@mail.com
- Phone: +254 759 550133
- Site: https://techantmedia.com
